description: Verify that only declared files were modified during step execution

checks.name: scope-enforcement
checks.label: Scope Boundary Check
checks.description: Run git diff and compare against step.declaredFiles whitelist
checks.pass: every modified file is in step.declaredFiles OR is in AUTO_GEN_WHITELIST

failure.userMessage: Step modified files outside of declared scope. This is a hard failure - scope creep indicates unplanned work or side effects.
